text:
Once upon an idle afternoon, there lived a tortoise who loved collecting colorful shells. Every morning, he would leisurely wander around the forest edges collecting treasures. One day, he stumbled across a peculiar object—a rocking horse. It wasn't just any ordinary ride; it gleamed with an old magic.

Curious but gentle-hearted, our wise tortoise took the rocking horse back to his favorite burrow. He'd sit atop it gently, rocking slowly back and forth. Suddenly, stars seemed to adorn the night sky above.

That night, under a shimmering aurora, a moonbeam drifted down. It touched his feathers. Instantly transformations occurred—the tortoise soared high above the trees. Birds sang his highest song. Stars danced in celestial circles. That night became legendary; soon tales spread throughout the forest.

Every child liked tales of the Star Thief's magical journey. And so, nightly, little ones would peek out their heads, hoping their eyes could catch a glimpse.
